user.title: AI Usage webhook
user.description: Configure the endpoint ID used by /api/webhook/{webhook_id}. Keep this value hard to guess.

data_description.webhook_id: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens. The final path is /api/webhook/{webhook_id}.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AI Usage webhook
reconfigure.description: Update the endpoint ID used by /api/webhook/{webhook_id}.

data_description.webhook_id: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens. The integration reloads after this value changes.

error.invalid_webhook_id: Use 8 to 128 characters containing only letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
